summary: Completed iteration 6 testing for Simplifii EdTech app. All new features working correctly: Credits renamed to 'Tickets' across app, Rubric Simplifier new format with sections/steps/points, Ticket Bundle pricing page (3 tiers), Guided tour on tool pages, Check-in feature for mood tracking, Sound toggle (CelebrationManager). Backend tests 100% pass (11/11). Frontend tests 100% pass.
passed_tests: Login with test@simplifii.com / test123 → redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard nav shows 'tickets' (not 'credits') next to balance number - shows 'TICKETS' label and '0 tickets'
Credits page shows 'Grab Your Tickets' header with 3 bundle packages
Starter Pack: 5 tickets/$7.50 - found
Semester Saver: 15 tickets/$15 - found (marked as BEST VALUE)
All-Access Pass: 30 tickets/$25 - found
Brief Simplifier shows guided tour prompt ('First time here?') when localStorage cleared
Brief Simplifier has file-input, assessment-title-input, assessment-type-select, submit-btn
Brief Simplifier shows '1 ticket' cost (not '1 credit')
Rubric Simplifier shows '1 ticket' cost
Rubric Simplifier has sound toggle button (CelebrationManager)
Essay Scorer shows '1 ticket' cost
Humaniser shows '1 ticket' cost
Assessment Scaffolder shows '1 ticket' cost
Hidden Curriculum shows '1 ticket' cost
Backend POST /api/checkin returns checkin_id and personalised message
Backend GET /api/checkins/{brief_id} returns checkin history array
Backend POST /api/rubric/simplify returns new format with sections array (sections with steps, points, tips)
Backend GET /api/notifications returns notifications array
Check-in modal opens with 4 mood buttons (great, okay, struggling, overwhelmed)
Check-in submission shows personalised response message
Results page has Check In button, sound toggle, weekly plan, progress bar
critical_code_review_comments: Credits.js correctly shows 'Grab Your Tickets' header and 3 bundle packages with correct pricing
Dashboard.js shows 'TICKETS' label in stats section
All tool pages correctly show '1 ticket' cost text
GuidedTour component properly uses localStorage keys like 'simplifii_tour_brief' to track tour status
CelebrationManager provides sound toggle button with localStorage persistence
Check-in endpoint returns personalised responses based on mood with suggestions for struggling/overwhelmed
Rubric Simplifier backend returns new format with sections array containing steps, points, tips
seed_data_creation: Used existing briefs 'Test Brief' and 'Marketing Strategy Essay' for testing

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check bypassed for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working. Credits renamed to 'Tickets' throughout frontend (backend still uses 'credits' internally). Ticket Bundle pricing page has 3 tiers: Starter Pack (5/$7.50), Semester Saver (15/$15), All-Access Pass (30/$25). Guided tour shows on first visit to tool pages via localStorage. Check-in feature stores mood data in 'checkins' collection and returns personalised responses. CelebrationManager provides balloon animations with sound toggle. Rubric Simplifier returns new format with sections array containing steps with points.

credits_to_tickets_rename.details: Dashboard shows 'TICKETS' label, Credits page shows 'Grab Your Tickets', all tool pages show '1 ticket' cost

ticket_bundle_pricing.details: 3 packages found: Starter Pack 5/$7.50, Semester Saver 15/$15 (BEST VALUE), All-Access Pass 30/$25

guided_tour.details: Tour prompt appears on Brief Simplifier and Rubric Simplifier when localStorage cleared

checkin_feature.details: Check-in modal with 4 moods, personalised responses, backend stores in 'checkins' collection

celebration_manager.details: Sound toggle button visible on Results page and Rubric Simplifier

rubric_simplifier_new_format.details: Backend returns sections array with steps, points, tips, colour coding

auth_preflight_check.details: Login works correctly with test credentials
